title: SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a network of volunteers to offer support to socially isolated families who lack natural support systems. Parents may be provided friendship, mentoring, or short-term respite care for their children during times of crisis without fear of losing custody of their children. Volunteers are fully vetted, trained, and provided professional support. 435 NE Evans Street Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families with children or youth adults ages 0-22 who do not currently have an open case with ODHS Child Welfare Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-4020 Safe Families For Children Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Children's Out of Home Respite Care Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY
